reasoning: While the LLM fidelity score is high (0.8978), the low shingling recall (0.605) strongly corroborates the identified omissions. The document is missing an entire top-level list item ('Future Priorities'), multiple sub-bullets, and functional government URLs, which exceeds the threshold for minor cosmetic issues. Given the cost asymmetry of publishing a document with significant content loss, this requires manual intervention.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis:
The output JSON suffers from multiple significant text omissions where informative labels and descriptions within icons or lists were not extracted as text elements. Specifically: 
1. Page 2: The descriptive text for all icons (e.g., 'Meeting Schedule, Agendas, Minutes and Presentations' for Council Meetings) and the date 'Aug 17, 2022' are missing.
2. Page 3: The list in Element 26 is missing all 6 sub-bullet points under 'Accomplishments' ('Data Governance', 'Public Access to GIS Data', etc.),
concerns.source_pdf_quote: • Data Governance • Public Access to GIS Data • Collaboration for Land Information • Intergovernmental Collaboration • Sharing Information and Knowledge • Future Priorities (Page 3); ADDRESS NC STEERING COMMITTEE, WORKING GROUP FOR SEAMLESS PARCELS (Page 8); NC ONEMAP CLOUD MIGRATION, TAC INFRASTRUCTURE WORKING GROUP (Page 9); 2020 CENSUS UPDATES AND ASSISTANCE, NOAA LAND COVER PILOT, ELEVATION DATA, HYDROGRAPHY WORKING GROUP (Page 11); ESRI SPECIAL ACHIEVEMENT AWARD, ESRI ENTERPRISE LICENSE AGR
concerns.output_quote: The text content for these items is absent from the corresponding sections in the JSON output, often replaced by generic alt-text for images that do not capture the information.
concerns.location: Elements 26, 71-72, 78-79, 92-95, 102-104, and the end of the element list for page 13.

concerns.analysis: The list on Page 3 ('Outline') is incorrectly converted. The source PDF shows a list with six top-level bullet points, one of which ('Accomplishments') has five nested sub-bullets. The output JSON list contains only the first five top-level items and completely omits the nested sub-bullets and the final top-level item ('Future Priorities'). This significant omission of structural components fails to preserve the meaning and content of the list.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
• Executive Summary
• About the Council
• FY 20-21 Highlights
• Goals
• Accomplishments
 • Data Governance
 • Public Access to GIS Data
 • Collaboration for Land Information
 • Intergovernmental Collaboration
 • Sharing Information and Knowledge
• Future Priorities

concerns.analysis: The output fails to capture two prominent URLs present in the source PDF. These are not rendered as link or text elements in the semantic layer, though they are visible in the original document. Missing essential functional content like government URLs is a defect.
concerns.output_quote: The text elements for these URLs are entirely absent from the corresponding elements arrays in Section 1 and Section 12.

action_items: Manually restore the missing 'Future Priorities' section and nested sub-bullets on Page 3.
Add missing URLs and icon descriptions to ensure full document fidelity and accessibility.
